title: Junior Investment Banker at Haribhakti & Co Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at Haribhakti & Co Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Haribhakti & Co Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Allahabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Haribhakti & Co Holdings Services:
Haribhakti & Co Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haribhakti & Co Holdings Services!
